integration_evidence.summary: Task Intent Envelope v0, Run lifecycle v0, Run Record creation rules, shared entry semantics, and research absorption decisions are integrated into repo docs.
GH-38 is the Loom anchor Work Item for the docs-only PR.
GH-37, GH-38, GH-39, and GH-40 issue coverage is mapped without marking host issues complete.
Validation commands and gate classifications are recorded in the GH-38 progress carrier.
